skills.name: requirement-to-test-trace-compiler
skills.summary: Compiles requirements and acceptance criteria into a complete test-intent graph.

skills.name: unit-test-generator
skills.summary: Generates focused unit tests for domain rules, value objects, services, transformations, and pure logic.

skills.name: integration-test-generator
skills.summary: Generates component integration tests using compatible databases, brokers, caches, storage, identity, and external-service substitutes.

skills.name: api-contract-test-generator
skills.summary: Generates provider, consumer, schema, compatibility, authorization, and error-contract tests for APIs.

skills.name: database-migration-test-generator
skills.summary: Generates migration, upgrade, rollback/forward-recovery, restart, lock, and data-preservation tests.

skills.name: e2e-journey-test-generator
skills.summary: Generates end-to-end tests for critical user and system journeys across frontend, backend, identity, data, and messaging.

skills.name: property-based-test-generator
skills.summary: Generates property-based and generative tests for invariants, parsers, transformations, state machines, and contracts.

skills.name: mutation-test-planner
skills.summary: Plans and executes mutation testing for high-value domain and security logic under cost controls.

skills.name: performance-test-generator
skills.summary: Generates load, stress, endurance, concurrency, backpressure, and capacity tests from measurable quality scenarios.

skills.name: security-test-generator
skills.summary: Generates authentication, authorization, tenant-isolation, injection, abuse, secret, dependency, and configuration security tests.

skills.name: accessibility-test-generator
skills.summary: Generates automated and manual accessibility checks for keyboard, semantics, focus, contrast, forms, charts, and dynamic content.

skills.name: test-data-and-fixture-factory
skills.summary: Generates deterministic, privacy-safe, referentially valid, tenant-aware test data and cleanup behavior.
